# Code Samples

A Dart sample:

```dart
void main() {
  final greeting = 'Hello, world!';
  print(greeting);
}
```

A bash sample:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
echo "running tests"
flutter test
```

A JSON sample:

```json
{
  "name": "markdown_viewer",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "tags": ["markdown", "mobile"]
}
```

A block whose language is unknown to the highlighter:

```fictional-lang
THIS IS PLAIN TEXT THAT MUST FALL BACK GRACEFULLY
```

A block with no language hint at all:

```
plain unstyled code
```
